# Paths removed from `main` when syncing from `dev`.
# `main` is the lean "release" branch — only what's needed to build & run the server,
# web app, Android app, and produce installers. Development docs, tests, scratch
# files, and AI-agent customisation live on `dev` only.
tests/
benchmark_results/
docker-instances/
downloads/
.claude/
AGENTS.md
CLAUDE.md
API_REFERENCE.md
TODO.md
android/TODO.md
blns.txt
reset-primary.sh
reset-server.sh
reset-primary.ps1
reset-server.ps1
bump-version.sh
bump-version.ps1
server/build_out.txt
.github/copilot-instructions.md
.github/sync-main-exclude.txt
.github/workflows/pipeline.yml
.vscode
pytest.ini
